transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/SjUhjnXzLj19JpFZXcM9A4cLjvqH2GTs

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (51 mins - No highlights)

Meeting Purpose

To diagnose firm bottlenecks and explore SMB Team's solutions for growth.

Key Takeaways

Core Problem: A staffing crisis (from losing two attorneys) is the primary growth bottleneck, not lead generation.

Growth Goal: Double revenue from a projected ~$1.25M in 2026 to a realistic $2.5M in 2027 by hiring two new attorneys and a paralegal.

Personal Goal: Delegate 3–4 hours of daily work to focus on high-value tasks like business expansion (e.g., a "family office" practice).

Proposed Solution: SMB Team's Fractional COO service to lead hiring and operational restructuring, enabling the firm to scale without increasing Ron's personal workload.

Topics

Firm Context & Bottleneck

Current State: 5 staff (2 attorneys, 3 support).

Primary Bottleneck: Staffing, not lead generation.

Cause: Losing two attorneys (one to death, one to relocation) created a capacity crisis.

Impact: The firm is at a growth ceiling, delaying non-standard cases and turning away some new business.

Hiring Challenge: Finding "A-players" in Lynchburg, VA, for complex elder law and estate tax planning.

Desired Profile: 5–10 years experience, comfortable with older clients.

Current Method: Ineffective use of Indeed and LinkedIn.

Growth Goals & Vision

Revenue:

2026 Projection: ~$1.25M (on track despite disruptions).

2027 Goal: $2.5M (realistic with new staff).

Hiring Needs:

Immediate: A paralegal to fill a critical ops role.

Next: Two in-office attorneys to handle caseload.

Personal Vision:

Delegate 3–4 hours of daily work to focus on business expansion.

Develop a "family office" practice.

Build a "well-oiled machine" that runs without constant intervention.

Proposed Solution: SMB Team

Service Model: A phased approach to build a scalable firm.

Phase 1 (Foundation): Hire A-players and build core systems.

Phase 2 (Automation): Implement AI workflows to automate tasks.

Phase 3 (Scaling): Ramp up marketing to support expansion.

Service Options:

Business Coaching: Teaches firm how to implement systems.

Fractional COO: SMB Team embeds in the firm to implement systems and lead hiring.

Recommendation: Fractional COO, as it directly solves the immediate hiring and operational needs.

Next Steps

Jacob: Send calendar invite for the follow-up meeting.

Jacob: Send a meeting recap to Ron.

Jacob: Prepare a tailored proposal for the follow-up.

Ron & Jacob: Meet on Friday, June 26th, at 12:30 PM to review the proposal.

Action Items

Consult SMBteam re: Ron's Phase 1 plan (paralegal + associate hires) - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Ron recap of today's call - WATCH (5 secs)
Attend follow-up call w/ Jacob, Jun 26 12:30 pm - WATCH (5 secs)
